senses.gloss: a young male human, a boy-child

examples.text: يَا زَكَرِيَّا إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَامٍ ٱسْمُهُ يَحْيَىٰ
examples.english: Zakariyyāh, we bring you the good news of a boy whose name shall be Yaḥyāh.

examples.text:
10th century, Al-Mutanabbi
فَرُبَّ غُلَامٍ عَلَّمَ الْمَجْدَ نَفْسَهُ كَتَعْلِيمِ سَيْفِ الدَّوْلَةِ الطَّعْنَ وٱلضَّرْبَا
examples.english: (please add an English translation of this quotation)

etymology.text: From the root غ ل م (ḡ l m). Compare Hebrew עֶלֶם (ʿélem, “a virgin boy”).
